channel.title: X Feed Transfer Generated Posts
channel.description: Generated X-ready posts produced from source articles

item.title: Claude goes into your tools: fast, fused workflows that cut repetitive tasks in design, 3D, and music apps. 🔥🤖 https://Blockchain.News/news/anthropic-claude-creative-tool-integrations #AI #Creativity #Blockchain

item.title: NVIDIA’s agentic AI slashes idle time in subsurface sims—24/7 autonomous workflows that push engineers from tasks to scenario exploration. 🚀 https://Blockchain.News/news/nvidia-agentic-ai-subsurface-engineering #AI #oilgas #engineering
